fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 76 is incorrect, causing the code to enter the branch and execute line 77, which wrongly removes a duplicate element when both input lists share the same last value.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left__1 and right__1 and merged__1[-1] == left__1[-1] == right__1[-1])

constraints.intent: This special case for removing a duplicate tail element should not be triggered.
The final merged list must contain all elements from both inputs.
In the common case where the special pop is not triggered, the length should be correct.
The number of items in the merged list must equal the number of items consumed from the inputs.
